zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich I. von Geldern於1117年5月27日出生在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德時，他的父親Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg31歲，母親Ermgard van Zutphen27歲。他於1135年與Agnes von Arnstein結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1182年9月4日在他的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 韋塞爾坎-林特福特。

zh-hans.Kloster Kamp, Kamp-Lintfort, Kreis Wesel: 德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 韋塞爾坎-林特福特

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich I. von Geldern于1117年5月27日出生在荷兰蓋爾德藍德时，他的父亲Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg31岁，母亲Ermgard van Zutphen27岁。他于1135年与Agnes von Arnstein结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1182年9月4日在他的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 韋塞爾坎-林特福特。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Geldern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northern England usually a variant of Geldard, an occupational name from Middle English gelde ‘sterile, barren’, used as a noun to denote ‘gelded cattle’, + Old English hierde, hence ‘herdman who tends the gelded cattle’.
English: alternatively, perhaps an occupational name from Middle English gelder(e) ‘gelder, castrator (of livestock)’.

variants.name: Gilder
meanings: English (Essex and Middlesex): occupational name for a goldsmith or gilder, from Middle English gilder, gelder, guldar, a derivative of Old English gyldan ‘to gild’.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich I. von Geldern was born on 27 May 1117, in Zutphen, Gelderland, Netherlands, his father, Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg, was 31 and his mother, Ermgard van Zutphen, was 27. He married Agnes von Arnstein in 1135. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 4 September 1182, in his hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Kamp-Lintfort, Wesel, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich I. von Geldern est né le 27 mai 1117, à Zutphen, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, son père, Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Ermgard van Zutphen, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Agnes von Arnstein en 1135. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 4 septembre 1182, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Kamp-Lintfort, Kreis Wesel, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich I. von Geldern am 27. Mai 1117 in Zutphen, Geldern, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg 31 und seine Mutter Ermgard van Zutphen 27. Er hat 1135 Agnes von Arnstein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 4. September 1182 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Kamp-Lintfort, Kreis Wesel, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich I. von Geldern è nato il il 27 maggio 1117 nel Zutphen, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Ermgard van Zutphen, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Agnes von Arnstein nel 1135. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 4 settembre 1182, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Kamp-Lintfort, Kreis Wesel, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ja.Kloster Kamp, Kamp-Lintfort, Kreis Wesel: ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス ウエセルカンプ-リントフォート
ja.Zutphen, Gelderland, Netherlands: オランダジェルダーランドズトフン
ja.Zutphen, Gelderland, Nederland: オランダジェルダーランドズトフン
ja.Geldern, Kreis Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfale: ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレブジェルデルン
ja.Zulphen, Gelderland, Netherlands: オランダジェルダーランドズイルベン
ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich I. von Geldernが1117年5月27日にオランダジェルダーランドズトフンで生まれた時，父Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenbergは31歳，母Ermgard van Zutphenは27歳であった。1135年にAgnes von Arnsteinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1182年9月4日に故郷で65歳で死去し，ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス ウエセルカンプ-リントフォートにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich I. von Geldern(이)가 1117년 5월 27일 네덜란드 글델랜드 주트프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermgard van Zutphen(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1135년 Agnes von Arnstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1182년 9월 4일 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 웨셀 카p-린트포트에 묻혔다.

mn.27 May 1117–4 September 1182: 1117 оны Тавдугаар сарын 27–1182 оны Есдүгээр сарын 4

pt.27 May 1117–4 September 1182: 27 de maio de 1117–4 de setembro de 1182
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich I. von Geldern nasceu em 27 de maio de 1117, em Zutphen, Gheldria, Países Baixos, seu pai, Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Ermgard van Zutphen, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes von Arnstein em 1135. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de setembro de 1182, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Kamp-Lintfort, Kreis Wesel, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich I. von Geldern родился 27 мая 1117 г. в местности зутфен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Ermgard van Zutphen, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes von Arnstein в 1135 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 4 сентября 1182 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности камп-линтфорт, крис весел, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.

sm.1133–1182: mai le 1133 e o'o I le 1182

es.27 May 1117–4 September 1182: 27 de mayo de 1117–4 de septiembre de 1182
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich I. von Geldern nació el 27 de mayo de 1117, en Zutphen, Gelderland, Países Bajos, su papá, Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Ermgard van Zutphen, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Agnes von Arnstein en 1135. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de septiembre de 1182, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Kamp-Lintfort, Kreis Wesel, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania.
